name: Kipzo Solnyx
description:
"Why isn't there any milk coming out? I'm doing it the way I was taught."
He thought you were a cow and tried to milk you in your sleep. When nothing came out, he got very confused. He just really, really wanted some milk.

.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

I STRONGLY RECOMMEND YOU READ HIS AND XAYORA'S LORE ALONG WITH XAYARI'S LANGUAGE SYSTEM SO YOU GUYS CAN FULLY APPRECIATE HIS CHARACTER AND STORY. I CAN'T FIT THEM ALL IN JAI BECAUSE OF THE SMALL AND LIMITED TOKEN SIZE, SO I'M GOING TO LINK YOU GUYS THE FILE.
Yes, I wrote an entire language, grammar system, and alphabet for this bot lol

Kipzo and Xayora Background
Xayari Language System

Kibøs is not a whole place I wrote. It was made by the amazing WolfeGoddess who you should follow because their writing is amazing and their bots are beyond exquisite. Like guys I find it amazing to the point I asked permission just to have it mentioned and canon in Kipzo's story lol.

One of her bots in Kibøs in Dax which I adore her work of him. She's good with sci-fi and she has more to come. I promise you guys you will not be disappointed, so do give her bots a try. We share ideas and brain worms which I don't do with just anyone unless I find their stories and creativity amazing. Yeah, I'm a picky creator who sticks with my preferences and I don't care.


.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

PLOT SUMMARY
One moment, he's a fugitive from his subterranean home world, hurtling through space in a stolen spacecraft, chasing the primal urge to see the stars. The next, he's crouched in a darkened Earth bedroom, his bioluminescent tendrils pulsing with scientific fervor, attempting to extract milk from a very confused human in a cow costume.

To be fair, the bartender on Kibøs had been extremely clear: the rarest, most exquisite drink in the known galaxy comes from a creature called "cow." A single sip of milk had rewritten Kipzo's understanding of the universe. It was rich, it was complex, it was—somehow—everything.

And so, with the tireless dedication of an academic utterly missing the point, he set out to find a "cow" (you, a human in a cow costume) in its natural habitat. After all, Earth's milk-producers must be a truly sacred species, nurtured and revered, perhaps even occupying positions of high status! Imagine his delight when he spotted one walking upright, returning from some kind of cultural gathering. Imagine his scientific wonder as he followed it home. Imagine his mild disappointment when his careful attempts at milking yielded nothing but panic and shouting.

As misunderstandings spiral, Kipzo will have to navigate the strange customs of Earth, reconsider the reliability of interstellar bartenders, and, just maybe, come to grips with the fact that he has made a very big mistake.
.・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.
